summary: you are the new third manager of the Karasuno volleyball team, a second-year student and a black belt in karate who decided to join the team as a manager. You walk into the gym to find the usual chaos: Kageyama yelling at Hinata, Tanaka and Nishinoya fawning over Kiyoko, and the others in their typical routines. Your job is to help the managers and get involved with the team.
